titleStmt.title: SII 25.187: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 187. (A.R. No. 187 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
The record furnishes the details of date viz., year 4, Siṁha ba 3, Thursday, Pūraṭṭādi-nakshatara which regularly correspond to July 29, 1249 A.D.

It records a deed of agreement (iśaivu-tīṭṭu) issued by the dēvaraḍiyār of the temple to the Ādichaṇḍēśvaradēvar of the temple of Tiruvuśāttāṉamuḍaiyār at Uśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśanich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puṟaṅkarambai-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu pertaining to an arrangement entered into among the dancing girls for maintaining lamps during different sandhis in front of the goddess Buvaṉāpati-nāchchiyār consecrated by Kaḷarikkuḍaiyāṉ Poṉṉambalakūttaṉ alias Irumuḍiśōḻa-Pallavarayaṉ in the western side circumambulatory path in the temple of Tiruvuśāttāṉamuḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . [ tribhuvaṉa] c cakkaravattikaḷ śrīrācentira coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu nālāvatu ciṅkanāyaṟṟu Aparapakkattu tiritiyaiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūraṭṭātināḷ Irācentira coḻavaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭu Ucāttāṉamāṉa keraḷa kulocaniccaruppeti maṅkalattu Uṭaiyaār tiruvucāttāṉa muṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭeciratevakaṉmikaḷukku Ikkoyil tevaraṭiyāril campattāṉa virapattiramāṇikkamum nācciyāṉa Ālālacuntaramāṇikkamum maturaiyāṇṭiyāṉa cikaraṇa māṇikkamum periya nācciyāṉa marutavetiyamāṇikkamum nācciyāṉa tiruvuṇṇāḻikai māṇikkamum cokkanācciyāṉa ceyattuvācca māṇikkamum tarmiyāṉa nattuṇai māṇikkamum tināṇṭa nācciyāṉa Etirili coḻamāṇikkamum nācciyāṉa piracaṉṉatevar māṇikkamum teviyāṉa vaṇṭuvār kuḻamāṇikkamum tiruvāṇṭāḷāṉatillaiyampala māṇikkamum
tiruvāṇṭāḷāṉa Irācrācamāṇikkamum comiyāṉa pala tayamāṇikkamum teviyāṉa tiruciṟṟampalamāṇikkamum periya peṇṭirāṉa tomaṉātatova māṇikkamum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom Upaiyam Icaivutiṭṭu kuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉṉāyaṉār koyil melai tirunaṭaimāḷikaiyil kaḷarikkuṭaiyāṉ poṉṉampala kūttaṉāṉa Irumuṭicoḻap pallavarayaṉ Eḻuntaruḷivitta puvaṉāpatinācciyār tirumuṉ(pa)pu Eṅkaḷ perāl tiruccūla paṟavaiyāṉa tipamālaiyil nāṅkaḷ vai(y)kka kaṭavatāṉa tiruviḷakku paṅku Iraṇṭukku viḷakku Oṉṟākavaikka kaṭavomākavum vaikkumiṭattu Iravaicanti tiruvotai cāmam Aṟutayāka Eriyum viḷakku E rai Erikkumiṭattu Eṇṇai nā kku viḷakku nāṟpatāka vanta viḻakkāṭṭile pa—This portion is left unengraved.vaṭatale
kukaḷ k kaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi ceyyumiṭattu mutalāy pukuntārum Ivviḻukkāṭṭile cantirātittavarai Ittiruviḷakku Eriyakkaṭavatākavum Ivvitikku kuṟai coṉṉār ruṇṭākil Ivarkaḷ cukatukkaṅkaḷkku cellātoḻika kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Upaiya Icaivutiṭṭu kuṭuttom Iṉṉāyaṉār koyil tevaraṭiyārom .
Digital edition of SII 25.187 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
